mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_ID , TITLE , CONTENT , WRITER , CREATED_AT , UPDATED_AT FROM BOARD ORDER BY BOARD_ID DESC
SELECT BOARD_ID , TITLE , CONTENT , WRITER , CREATED_AT , UPDATED_AT FROM BOARD WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOARD ( BOARD_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, WRITER, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( board_seq.NEXTVAL, #{title}, #{content}, #{writer}, SYSDATE )
